meta.scope: This file is the single source of truth for styling, layout, and component recipes in this app. Any new UI should match these rules exactly.

principles: Generous whitespace: prefer larger padding/margins and fewer elements per view.
High contrast: primary text and key actions use pure black on white.
Geometric softness: cards and panels use large radii (28–32px); buttons are fully rounded.
Minimalist data viz: monochrome charts; avoid noisy decorations.
Subtle depth: use soft shadows; avoid heavy borders and avoid glossy effects.
No blue/violet gradients: do not introduce blue/violet gradients or blue/violet-tinted UI. Use neutral grayscale only.

accessibility.focus: All interactive elements MUST have visible focus styles. Use focus-visible rings consistent with Button base classes.
accessibility.contrast: Maintain WCAG-friendly contrast. Primary actions are black on white; body text uses secondary gray only for non-critical content.
accessibility.motion: Keep transitions subtle (opacity/color). Avoid large motion/animated gradients.

wash.description: Neutral washed-out background (no blue/violet hues). Use for the entire page shell.

sections.alternate_background: Use bg-background-muted for large sections to create a soft banded layout.
sections.hero_spacing: Hero section uses pt-20 pb-30 with a centered heading, subheading, and single primary CTA.

Container.description: Max width container with consistent horizontal padding.
Container.usage: Wrap all major sections. Never use full-width text blocks without Container.

Button.description: Primary CTA buttons are black pills; secondary is outlined; ghost is subtle surface button.
Button.base_tailwind: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background-main
rules: Use primary for the single main CTA per section.
Do not add gradients, glows, or blue accents.
Keep icons minimal; if used, align inline with gap-2 and keep monochrome.

Badge.description: Small pill used for subtle metadata (e.g., 'Updated today').
Badge.tailwind: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-background-surface px-3.5 py-2 text-label text-text-secondary border border-brand-border shadow-soft
rules: Badges are informational, not primary actions.
Do not use bright colors; keep neutral.

MiniStat.tailwind: rounded-2xl border border-brand-border bg-background-surface px-5 py-4 shadow-soft

Input.description: Neutral input used sparingly. Inputs are not a visual focus in this landing dashboard.
Input.tailwind: bg-accents-neutral border border-brand-border rounded-input px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-primary transition-colors
rules: No colored focus glows; only border change.
Keep sizes compact and consistent with fixed widget input.

HeroPreviewFrame.description: Large dashboard mock frame in the hero area.
rules: Frame is the visual anchor. Keep content monochrome and readable.
Floating cards are allowed only around this frame and should be minimal.
Monochrome only.
No gridlines unless extremely subtle.
Use rounded-chart and consistent spacing.
Use low density (few rows/cols) for cleanliness.
Avoid bright colors; keep neutral.

Navigation.description: Floating pill header with centered links and right-side auth actions.
Navigation.shell_tailwind: rounded-full bg-background-surface border border-brand-border shadow-soft px-5 py-3
rules: Header stays sticky.
Keep the nav minimal (5 links max).
Use secondary button for Login and primary for Get Started.

Footer.description: Dark section with a large rounded container and columns.
Footer.inner_tailwind: rounded-card bg-brand-primary/95 border border-text-muted/20 p-10 md:p-12

rules: Keep content density low: prefer 1 hero, 1 preview, 2 detail sections, 1 testimonial, 1 footer.
Maintain consistent spacing: use py-30 for major sections.
Never introduce blue/violet gradients or blue/violet color accents.

when_adding_new_ui: Use existing component recipes (Container/Button/Card/Panel/Badge) and do not invent new styling patterns without updating this file.
Prefer composition over novelty: reuse Card + Panel patterns.
Do not add external UI libraries that change styling conventions unless explicitly requested.
Avoid new colors. If a new token is needed, add it under tokens and ensure it remains neutral grayscale.
do_not: Do not add blue or violet gradients anywhere.
Do not add emoji in UI text.
Do not add heavy drop shadows, neon glows, or high-saturation accents.
Do not mix multiple competing radius systems (stick to card/input/chart/pill).
